nodes.name: build-fix.prompt.md
nodes.summary: Reusable GitHub Copilot agent prompt for systematically diagnosing and resolving build errors, type errors, and failing CI — covering error categorization, fix strategy, and rules against suppressing warnings or skipping hooks.

nodes.name: plan.prompt.md
nodes.summary: Reusable GitHub Copilot agent prompt that drives a structured phased implementation planning process — clarifying goals, researching reuse opportunities, decomposing work into independently shippable phases, and defining acceptance criteria.

nodes.name: refactor.prompt.md
nodes.summary: Reusable GitHub Copilot agent prompt for behavior-preserving code refactoring — targeting dead code removal, duplication reduction, structure improvements, and naming clarity, with explicit constraints against mixing refactoring with feature work.

nodes.name: security-review.prompt.md
nodes.summary: Reusable GitHub Copilot agent prompt providing a comprehensive OWASP-aligned security review checklist covering secrets management, input validation, authentication, data exposure, dependency auditing, and infrastructure hardening, with a severity-rated output format.

nodes.name: tdd.prompt.md
nodes.summary: Reusable GitHub Copilot agent prompt enforcing the Red-Green-Improve TDD cycle — requiring a failing test before any implementation, covering unit/integration/E2E test layers, quality gates at 80% coverage, and common anti-patterns to avoid.
